auth.resetSent: Reset link sent! Check your inbox.

dashboard.autoPayPromoSubtitle: Your plan renews automatically on your anniversary date — and you get +{{gb}} GB bonus data right away.

plans.title: Prepaid phone plans
plans.subtitle: No credit checks. No term contracts. All on your terms.
plans.featuredDeal: Get 35 GB for just $29/month with Auto-Pay
plans.allPlansIncludeBody: Call display, call forwarding and group calling.
plans.autoPayBonusBody: Enroll in Auto-Pay to receive {{gb}} GB of bonus data each month for as long as you stay enrolled.
plans.detailDisclaimer: Plan details sourced from chatrwireless.com. Speeds up to 150Mbps on 4G. Data usage is subject to the Data Management Policy.

intro.lead: Affordable prepaid plans from Canada's #1 prepaid mobile provider*. Powered by the Rogers network.
intro.deal: Capture this deal! Get 35 GB for just $29/month with Autopay.

addons.title: Add-ons
addons.subtitle: Enhance your plan with convenient add-ons
addons.purchasedDetail: {{name}} is now active on your account until {{date}}.
addons.setupTitle: Let's get your add-on set up.
addons.setupNewDesc: First, you'll need to activate your plan and select your add-on.
addons.setupExistingDesc: Sign in to My chatr to check if your plan is compatible for this add-on.
addons.confirmPrice: One-time charge: {{price}} (deducted from your account balance)
addons.confirmTermsDefault: This add-on is valid for 30 days from purchase. Charges are non-refundable once activated.
addons.confirmTermsRoaming: Roaming data is valid for 30 days from purchase in eligible destinations. Data does not roll over.
addons.confirmTermsLd: International long-distance minutes are valid for 30 days from purchase for listed destinations.
addons.confirmTermsData: Adds {{gb}} GB to your plan for 30 days. Data is used before your base plan allowance where applicable.
addons.confirmTermsTalk: Talk Saver minutes are valid for 30 days from purchase.
addons.confirmTermsText: US roaming text messages are valid for 30 days from purchase.

topUp.title: Top up
topUp.autoPayDesc: Get bonus data every cycle with automatic payments

landing.intro: Add money to your chatr account to keep your service active. Choose the option that works best for you.
landing.guestBody: Top up without signing in. Enter your phone number and pay with a credit or debit card.
landing.signInBody: Sign in to My chatr to view your balance, manage payment cards, and top up your account.
landing.signedInBody: You're signed in. Top up your account, manage saved cards, or enroll in Auto-Pay.
landing.exploreTitle: Explore ways to top up your account
landing.autoPayBannerTitle: Auto-pay: the easiest way to top up
landing.autoPayBannerBody: Never miss a payment. Auto-pay tops up your account on your renewal date and you get bonus data.
landing.cardStoreTitle: Call or text to top up with a top up card
landing.cardStoreBody1: From your chatr phone, text your 12-digit top-up card PIN to 611.
landing.cardStoreBody2: If you already have a top-up card or payment card on your account, top-up by dialing *611 from your chatr phone.
landing.cardStoreBody3: Top-up cards are available at select retailers.
landing.remindersBody: If you have a payment card saved on your My chatr account, we'll send you monthly top-up reminders. Just reply Yes to the text, and we'll automatically charge your saved card.
landing.linkCards: Manage your saved payment cards in My chatr
landing.linkAutoPayCard: Change the payment card you've assigned for auto-pay in My chatr

guest.title: Top-up as a guest
guest.intro: Topping up is fast and easy! You don't even need to sign in. Simply enter the chatr phone number you want to top-up and continue.
guest.phoneHint: Make sure the phone number you enter matches the chatr account you're topping up.
guest.confirmationBody: {{amount}} has been added to {{phone}}. Your updated balance will appear within a few minutes.
guest.merchantAddress: chatr mobile, 333 Bloor Street East, Toronto, Ontario M4W 1G9, Canada

coverage.title: Coverage
coverage.subtitle: Nation-wide coverage from coast to coast
coverage.mapSubtitle: Check out our coverage map to make sure you're connected. Search for a location or postal code to get information about our network coverage.
coverage.searchPlaceholder: Enter a location or postal code
coverage.noCoverageMessage: Limited or no chatr coverage in this area. Check back as our network expands.
coverage.featureNationBody: Stay connected with a network that's got you covered from coast-to-coast.
coverage.featureExtendedBody: Go even further in Canada with chatr's Extended Network Coverage.
coverage.featurePlansBody: Affordable nation-wide plans that fit your budget. Starting from $15/mo.
coverage.fullDetailsBody: Coverage maps are approximate and represent chatr's Rogers-powered network reach for demo purposes. Actual coverage varies by device, terrain, and network conditions. In-zone plans are available in select data zones — dial *#555# from your chatr phone to check your zone.

stores.title: Store locator
stores.subtitle: 3,000+ chatr stores coast-to-coast
stores.searchPlaceholder: Enter a postal code or city
stores.locationDenied: Location permission was denied. Search by city or postal code instead.
stores.locationError: Unable to get your location. Try searching by city or postal code.
stores.topUpRetailTitle: Top-up cards are available at select retailers
stores.topUpRetailBody: Check out these other locations you can buy top-up cards from. Please check individual retailers for their store hours.

support.title: We can help
support.featuredBanner: Bought your chatr phone from TSC? Learn how to track your order and get delivery updates.
support.autoPayBody: Set up Auto-Pay with a credit card and receive bonus data on eligible plans every month — no manual top-ups required.
support.stillNeedHelpBody: We're here for you. Our team can help with any questions about your account or services.
support.ticketBody: In this demo, support tickets are not sent to a live team. Browse the categories above or call 611 from your chatr phone for real assistance.
support.categoryNotFound: This support category could not be found.
support.chatWelcome: Hi! How can I help you today?
support.chatResponse: Thanks for your message. A chatr representative would assist you here. For this demo, try browsing our FAQ or visiting a store.

demo.title: Demo mode
demo.subtitle: Switch scenarios for your sales presentation
demo.noSearchResults: No journeys match your search. Try different keywords or clear the search.
demo.stateNoUser: No user signed in. Launch a journey or sign in to populate profile state.

1.quote: I am very happy with the Chatr product. It's easy to use and the customer service is very helpful.

2.quote: Switching to chatr was simple. Great coverage and the app makes topping up effortless.

coverage.subtitle: Enjoy reliable coverage across the country.

reliable.title: Reliable connection
reliable.body: Stay connected where it matters most.

purchase-sim.question: How can I purchase a SIM card?
purchase-sim.answer: Order a chatr SIM online for $10 with free shipping, or visit any chatr store coast-to-coast.

activate-sim.question: How do I activate a SIM card?
activate-sim.answer: Insert your chatr SIM, then follow the activation wizard in the app or online. You'll pick a plan and create your My chatr account.

roaming.question: Can I use Chatr while traveling abroad?
roaming.answer: Yes — add a roaming travel pack from the add-ons marketplace before you travel. Manage everything from My chatr.

payment.question: What are the available payment methods?
payment.answer: Top up with Visa, Mastercard, or American Express. Enroll in Auto-Pay for bonus data and hassle-free renewals.

change-plan.question: How do I change my Chatr plan?
change-plan.answer: Sign in to My chatr, browse plans, and confirm your new plan. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.
